name: Benefit Duration Riverton

mainEntity.name: How long workers comp benefits last Riverton Utah?
mainEntity.text: How long workers comp benefits last Riverton Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: TTD until MMI (up to 312 weeks), then PPD/lifetime medical if approved.

suggestedAnswer.text: Riverton caps: 78 weeks TTD post-2010, extensions possible. Insurers cut off prematurely; lawyer proves ongoing need for extended pay.

description: TTD until MMI (up to 312 weeks), then PPD/lifetime medical if approved.
